known_issues: App shows 'connecting' indefinitely and prevents user from entering

existing_features.title: Investigate and fix the indefinite 'connecting' state that prevents users from entering the app. Identify where the connecting screen/state is triggered (likely in authentication flow, Internet Identity initialization, or actor setup) and ensure it transitions correctly to the authenticated state or displays a meaningful error with a retry option if the connection genuinely fails.

Add a timeout mechanism to the authentication/actor initialization flow so that if the 'connecting' state does not resolve within 15 seconds, the app exits the connecting state, displays a user-friendly error message, and offers a retry or logout option.

projectName: Fix indefinite 'connecting' state blocking app entry
